mapper.select: SELECT id, option_text, is_correct, question_id FROM question_option WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, option_text, is_correct, question_id FROM question_option WHERE question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question_option (option_text, is_correct, question_id) VALUES (#{optionText}, #{isCorrect}, #{questionId})

INSERT INTO question_option (option_text, is_correct, question_id) VALUES
(#{option.optionText}, #{option.isCorrect}, #{option.questionId})
